fields.name: VolumeClaimTemplateSpec
fields.doc: VolumeClaimTemplateSpec defaults workspace PVC for pipeline runs. accessModes and storageClassName must be provided.

fields.name: ConfigMapKey
fields.doc: Key should map to a CA bundle. The key is also used to name the CA bundle file (e.g. ca-bundle.crt)

fields.name: Deploy
fields.doc: Enable DS Pipelines Operator management of Persisence Agent. Setting Deploy to false disables operator reconciliation. Default: true

fields.name: Image
fields.doc: Specify a custom image for DSP PersistenceAgent.

fields.name: NumWorkers
fields.doc: Number of worker for Persistence Agent sync job. Default: 2

fields.name: Resources
fields.doc: Specify custom Pod resource requirements for this component.

fields.name: Deploy
fields.doc: Enable DS Pipelines Operator management of ScheduledWorkflow. Setting Deploy to false disables operator reconciliation. Default: true

fields.name: Image
fields.doc: Specify a custom image for DSP ScheduledWorkflow controller.

fields.name: CronScheduleTimezone
fields.doc: Specify the Cron timezone used for ScheduledWorkflow PipelineRuns. Default: UTC

fields.name: Resources
fields.doc: Specify custom Pod resource requirements for this component.

fields.name: CustomExtraParams
fields.doc: CustomExtraParams allow users to further customize the sql dsn parameters used by the Pipeline Server when opening a connection with the Database. ref: https://github.com/go-sql-driver/mysql?tab=readme-ov-file#dsn-data-source-name Value must be a JSON string. For example, to disable tls for Pipeline Server DB connection the user can provide a string: {"tls":"true"} If updating post DSPA deployment, then a manual restart of the pipeline server pod will be required so the new configmap may be consumed.

fields.name: DisableHealthCheck
fields.doc: Default: false

fields.name: Deploy
fields.doc: Enable DS Pipelines Operator management of MariaDB. Setting Deploy to false disables operator reconciliation. Default: true

fields.name: Image
fields.doc: Specify a custom image for DSP MariaDB pod.

fields.name: Username
fields.doc: The MariadB username that will be created. Should match `^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+`. Default: mlpipeline

fields.name: DBName
fields.doc: The database name that will be created. Should match `^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+`. // Default: mlpipeline

fields.name: PVCSize
fields.doc: Customize the size of the PVC created for the default MariaDB instance. Default: 10Gi

fields.name: StorageClassName
fields.doc: Volume Mode Filesystem storageClass to use for PVC creation

fields.name: Resources
fields.doc: Specify custom Pod resource requirements for this component.

fields.name: APIServer
fields.doc: DS Pipelines API Server configuration.

fields.name: PersistenceAgent
fields.doc: DS Pipelines PersistenceAgent configuration.

fields.name: ScheduledWorkflow
fields.doc: DS Pipelines Scheduled Workflow configuration.

fields.name: Database
fields.doc: Database specifies database configurations, used for DS Pipelines metadata tracking. Specify either the default MariaDB deployment, or configure your own External SQL DB.

fields.name: ObjectStorage
fields.doc: ObjectStorage specifies Object Store configurations, used for DS Pipelines artifact passing and storage. Specify either the your own External Storage (e.g. AWS S3), or use the default Minio deployment (unsupported, primarily for development, and testing) .

fields.name: PodToPodTLS
fields.doc: PodToPodTLS Set to "true" or "false" to enable or disable TLS communication between DSPA components (pods). Defaults to "true" to enable TLS between all pods. Only supported in DSP V2 on OpenShift.

fields.name: WorkflowController
fields.doc: WorkflowController is an argo-specific component that manages a DSPA's Workflow objects and handles the orchestration of them with the central Argo server

fields.name: Minio
fields.doc: Enable DS Pipelines Operator management of Minio. Setting Deploy to false disables operator reconciliation.

fields.name: DisableHealthCheck
fields.doc: Default: false

fields.name: EnableExternalRoute
fields.doc: Enable an external route so the object storage is reachable from outside the cluster. Default: false

fields.name: Deploy
fields.doc: Enable DS Pipelines Operator management of Minio. Setting Deploy to false disables operator reconciliation. Default: true

fields.name: Bucket
fields.doc: Provide the Bucket name that will be used to store artifacts in S3. If provided bucket does not exist, DSP Apiserver will attempt to create it. As such the credentials provided should have sufficient permissions to do create buckets. Default: mlpipeline

fields.name: S3CredentialSecret
fields.doc: Credentials for the S3 user (e.g. IAM user cred stored in a k8s secret.). Note that the S3 user should have the permissions to create a bucket if the provided bucket does not exist.

fields.name: PVCSize
fields.doc: Customize the size of the PVC created for the Minio instance. Default: 10Gi

fields.name: StorageClassName
fields.doc: Volume Mode Filesystem storageClass to use for PVC creation

fields.name: Resources
fields.doc: Specify custom Pod resource requirements for this component.

fields.name: Image
fields.doc: Specify a custom image for Minio pod.

fields.name: Deploy
fields.doc: Enable DS Pipelines Operator management of MLMD. Setting Deploy to false disables operator reconciliation. Default: true

fields.name: Deploy
fields.doc: Enable deployment of the Argo Workflow Controller for this DSPA, if the DSPO's global management state for WorkflowControllers is also set to Managed (default). It is overriden by the global management state if it is set to Removed. Default: true

fields.name: Resources
fields.doc: Specify custom Pod resource requirements for this component.

api_types.name: ResourceRequirements
api_types.doc: ResourceRequirements structures compute resource requirements. Replaces ResourceRequirements from corev1 which also includes optional storage field. We handle storage field separately, and should not include it as a subfield for Resources.

fields.name: BasePath
fields.doc: Subpath where objects should be stored for this DSPA

fields.name: SecretName
fields.doc: The name of the Secret where the AccessKey and SecretKey are defined.

fields.name: AccessKey
fields.doc: The "Keys" in the k8sSecret key/value pairs. Not to be confused with the values.

fields.name: State
fields.doc: Set to one of the following values: - "Managed" : This pipeline is automatically imported. - "Removed" : This pipeline is not automatically imported. If previously set to "Managed", setting to "Removed" does not remove existing managed pipelines but does prevent future updates from being imported.

fields.name: Deploy
fields.doc: Enable DS Pipelines Operator management of DSP API Server. Setting Deploy to false disables operator reconciliation. Default: true

fields.name: Image
fields.doc: Specify a custom image for DSP API Server.

fields.name: EnableRoute
fields.doc: Create an Openshift Route for this DSP API Server. Note, this doesn't provide OAuth functionality but is protected by authorization. Default: true

fields.name: EnableSamplePipeline
fields.doc: Include the Iris sample pipeline with the deployment of this DSP API Server. Default: true

fields.name: ArgoLauncherImage
fields.doc: Launcher/Executor image used during pipeline execution.

fields.name: ArgoDriverImage
fields.doc: Driver image used during pipeline execution.

fields.name: ManagedPipelines
fields.doc: The technology preview InstructLab pipeline was removed and this field is reserved for future managed pipeline options.

fields.name: Resources
fields.doc: Specify custom Pod resource requirements for this component.

fields.name: CABundle
fields.doc: If the Object store/DB is behind a TLS secured connection that is unrecognized by the host OpenShift/K8s cluster, then you can provide a PEM formatted CA bundle to be injected into the DSP server pod to trust this connection. CA Bundle should be provided as values within configmaps, mapped to keys.

fields.name: CustomServerConfig
fields.doc: CustomServerConfig is a custom config file that you can provide for the api server to use instead.

fields.name: CustomKfpLauncherConfigMap
fields.doc: When specified, the `data` contents of the `kfp-launcher` ConfigMap that DSPO writes will be fully replaced with the `data` contents of the ConfigMap specified here. This allows the user to fully replace the `data` contents of the kfp-launcher ConfigMap. The `kfp-launcher` component requires a ConfigMap to exist in the namespace where it runs (i.e. the namespace where pipelines run). This ConfigMap contains object storage configuration, as well as pipeline root (object store root path where artifacts will be uploaded) configuration. Currently this ConfigMap *must* be named "kfp-launcher". We currently deploy a default copy of the kfp-launcher ConfigMap via DSPO, but a user may want to provide their own ConfigMap configuration, so that they can specify multiple object storage sources and paths.

fields.name: CABundleFileMountPath
fields.doc: This is the path where the ca bundle will be mounted in the pipeline server and user executor pods

fields.name: CABundleFileName
fields.doc: This is the filename of the ca bundle that will be created in the pipeline server and user executor pods

fields.name: ArtifactSignedURLExpirySeconds
fields.doc: The expiry time (seconds) for artifact download links when querying the dsp server via /apis/v2beta1/artifacts/{id}?share_url=true Default: 60

fields.name: PipelineStore
fields.doc: The storage for pipeline definitions (pipelines and pipeline versions). It can be either 'database' or 'kubernetes' (Pipeline and PipelineVersion kinds). Defaults to 'database'.

fields.name: CacheEnabled
fields.doc: Allows/disallows caching in the DSP API server. When true, cache options are permitted for Pipelines and Task configurations made via the KFP SDK at compile time. When false, caching is always disabled and overrides the Pipelines and Task configurations. Default: true

fields.name: Workspace
fields.doc: Workspace config defines the default pipeline run workspace (PVC) specification applied to runs. The workspace provides ephemeral shared storage that lives for the duration of a pipeline run so components can exchange large intermediate data without repeatedly uploading to object storage. The user specifies the workspace size with: @dsl.pipeline(pipeline_config=dsl.PipelineConfig(workspace=dsl.WorkspaceConfig(size="25Mi"))).

operator_config.name: samplePipelineTemplates
operator_config.doc:
Sample Pipeline and Config are resources deployed conditionally
as such it is handled separately

operator_config.name: serverRoute
operator_config.doc:
serverRoute is a resource deployed conditionally
as such it is handled separately

operator_config.name: DefaultDBConnectionTimeout
operator_config.doc: DefaultDBConnectionTimeout is the default DB storage healthcheck timeout

operator_config.name: DefaultObjStoreConnectionTimeout
operator_config.doc: DefaultObjStoreConnectionTimeout is the default Object storage healthcheck timeout

operator_config.name: GlobalODHCaBundleConfigMapName
operator_config.doc:
GlobalODHCaBundleConfigMapName key and label values  are a contract with
ODH Platform https://github.com/opendatahub-io/architecture-decision-records/pull/28

operator_config.name: GlobalODHCaBundleConfigMapSystemBundleKey
operator_config.doc:
GlobalODHCaBundleConfigMapSystemBundleKey is the key that is added by network operator
https://docs.openshift.com/container-platform/4.15/networking/configuring-a-custom-pki.html#certificate-injection-using-operators_configuring-a-custom-pki

operator_config.name: requiredFields
operator_config.doc:
Any required Configmap paths can be added here,
they will be automatically included for required
validation check

operator_config.name: errorUpdatingDspaStatusMsg
operator_config.value: Encountered error when updating the DSPA status

operator_config.name: MlmdIsRequired
operator_config.value: MLMD explicitly disabled in DSPA, but is a required component for DSP

operator_config.name: CompareResourceProcs
operator_config.doc:
CompareResourceProcs maps object kind's to their associated comparison procedures.
To add new comparison procedures, ensure they are added to compareResourceProcs
and follow the same signature.

summary: data-science-pipelines-operator is a Kubernetes component. managing 4 CRD(s): DataSciencePipelinesApplication, Pipeline, PipelineVersion, ScheduledWorkflow. deploying 3 workload(s) (mariadb, minio, data-science-pipelines-operator-controller-manager) with 3 container(s). watching 10 resource type(s). exposing 11 service(s). with 2 webhook(s) (1 validating, 1 mutating). protected by 2 network policy/policies. connecting to external services: minio, mysql. defining 1 API spec type(s) across 28 struct(s) with 114 total fields. with 105 operator config constants (12 image references). following 9 reconciliation steps across 1 controller(s). exposing 8 Prometheus metrics. reporting 10 status condition types. with 2 ingress route(s).
